error.missing_library_section_key: Set at least one library section key (movie or TV).
error.missing_tmdb_api_key: Set a TMDB API key for TMDB sensors.
error.missing_tmdb_api_key_for_module: Enable shared TMDB API key first, then enable TMDB enrichment for this module.
error.missing_tmdb_api_key_for_dependency: Set a TMDB API key in the TMDB module first.

user.title: Set up Mediarr
user.description: Choose the modules you want to configure. The TMDB API key is only entered in the TMDB module.

data_description.seer: Adds recommendation sensors and request actions from Overseerr/Jellyseerr.
data_description.immaculaterr: Adds Immaculaterr movie and TV suggestion sensors.
data_description.tmdb: Configures TMDB sensors and the shared TMDB API key for enrichment.
data_description.plex: Adds a Plex recently-added sensor with TMDB poster/backdrop enrichment.
data_description.jellyfin: Adds a Jellyfin recently-added sensor with TMDB poster/backdrop enrichment.
data_description.sonarr: Adds a Sonarr calendar sensor for upcoming episodes.
data_description.sonarr2: Adds a second Sonarr calendar sensor instance.
data_description.radarr: Adds a Radarr calendar sensor for upcoming movie releases.
data_description.radarr2: Adds a second Radarr calendar sensor instance.
data_description.trakt: Adds Trakt popular/trending discovery with TMDB posters.

seer.title: Seer
seer.description: Configure Seer access and choose which Seer sensor groups should be enabled.

data_description.tmdb_enrichment: Requires a valid TMDB API key in the TMDB module.
data_description.max_items: Maximum number of items returned per sensor update.

immaculaterr.title: Immaculaterr
immaculaterr.description: Connect to Immaculaterr and choose mode, limits, and Plex libraries.

data_description.mode: Review shows suggestions for manual decisions. Pending Approval focuses on pending approvals.
data_description.tmdb_enrichment: Requires a valid TMDB API key in the TMDB module.
data_description.max_items: Maximum number of items returned per sensor update.
data_description.movie_library_section_keys: Detected Plex movie libraries. Select one or more.
data_description.tv_library_section_keys: Detected Plex TV libraries. Select one or more.
data_description.movie_library_section_key: Use only if auto-detection is unavailable.
data_description.tv_library_section_key: Use only if auto-detection is unavailable.

tmdb.title: TMDB
tmdb.description: Set the TMDB API key and choose which TMDB sensor groups should be enabled.

data_description.tmdb_api_key: This key is reused by modules that enable TMDB enrichment.
data_description.max_items: Maximum number of items returned per sensor update.

plex.title: Plex
plex.description: Connect Plex for the recently added sensor.

data_description.language: Language code used for TMDB metadata, for example en or de.

jellyfin.title: Jellyfin
jellyfin.description: Connect Jellyfin for the recently added sensor.

data_description.language: Language code used for TMDB metadata, for example en or de.

sonarr2.title: Sonarr (instance 2)
sonarr2.description: Configure a second Sonarr instance for upcoming episodes.

radarr.title: Radarr
radarr.description: Configure Radarr for upcoming movie releases.

radarr2.title: Radarr (instance 2)
radarr2.description: Configure a second Radarr instance for upcoming movie releases.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only one Mediarr configuration is allowed.

error.missing_library_section_key: Set at least one library section key (movie or TV).
error.missing_tmdb_api_key: Set a TMDB API key for TMDB sensors.
error.missing_tmdb_api_key_for_module: Enable shared TMDB API key first, then enable TMDB enrichment for this module.
error.missing_tmdb_api_key_for_dependency: Set a TMDB API key in the TMDB module first.
